features: fall-down, pet, vehicle, package & wandering AI detection
release_notes: New (~2026) Wi-Fi 6 successor to the older 2.4GHz Ranger RC (IPC-GK2CP-3C0WR/4C0WR/5C0WR). Sold in 3MP (2304x1296), 4MP (2560x1440) and 5MP (2880x1620) variants; the 5MP is used here as the top SKU. RTSP/ONVIF is not documented for this new SKU (the older Ranger RC supported Dahua RTSP).

frigate.notes: Plugged-in Wi-Fi 6 indoor camera. RTSP is not documented for this new (2026) SKU; the older Ranger RC exposed the Dahua realmonitor path (rtsp://{user}:{pass}@{ip}:554/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=0), which will likely work here too but is unverified.
